'''''The Empire Strikes Back Weekly'' 132''' is the one hundred thirty-second issue of the ''[[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly]]'' series of comic reprints, published on [[September 4]], [[1980]].

==Contents==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 43|''Star Wars'' (1977) 43]] {{C|Part 3}}
*"Monsters of the Cosmos: Magneto!"
*"Heroes of the Galaxy: Gullivar Jones, Warrior of Mars!"
*"Tales of the Watcher: Twelve Silent Men!"
